description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow for integration tests that runs on merge groups and pull requests. The workflow consists of multiple jobs: build firmware, formatting check, cppcheck, cppcheck in Docker, and hardware testing. Each job runs on an ubuntu-latest environment, sets up Python 3.10, and installs PlatformIO. The build job compiles firmware, the formatting check job runs clang-format style check, the cppcheck jobs run static analysis, and the hardware testing job runs PlatformIO tests on self-hosted runners.
